formulas.name: Crystal Lattice
formulas.variables: V = Volume of the unit cell, M = Mass of the unit cell, N = Number of atoms in the unit cell
formulas.units: Units of length (e.g., m or cm)
formulas.notes: [for face-centered cubic (FCC) and body-centered cubic (BCC) lattices]

formulas.name: Number of Atoms per Unit Cell
formulas.variables: a_0 = Lattice constant of the parent substance, a = Lattice constant of the alloy
formulas.notes: [for calculating number of atoms in a unit cell of an alloy]

formulas.name: Density of the Crystal
formulas.variables: M = Mass of the unit cell, V = Volume of the unit cell

formulas.name: Lattice Constant
formulas.units: Units of length (e.g., m or cm)
formulas.notes: [for calculating lattice constant for a hexagonal close-packed (HCP) structure]

formulas.name: Rutherford's Formula
formulas.variables: α = Scattering factor, Z = Atomic number, e = Elementary charge, r = Distance between the nucleus and the electron
formulas.notes: [for explaining the scattering of alpha particles]

formulas.name: X-Ray Diffraction by Crystal
formulas.variables: d = Interplanar distance, θ = Angle of diffraction, n = Order of diffraction, λ = Wavelength of X-ray
formulas.units: Units of length (e.g., m or cm)

formulas.name: Bravais Lattices
formulas.formula: 7 Bravais lattices: primitive cubic, face-centered cubic, body-centered cubic, hexagonal close-packed, tetragonal, orthorhombic, monoclinic
